title: Broadcast link for dashboards
excerpt: I know this has been requested many times but there isn’t any recent information on this. I wanted to request again to reiterate how important this feature request it. It is not in my company’s best interest to share all…

posts.author: ENies (Emily Nies)
posts.cookedHtml: I know this has been requested many times but there isn’t any recent information on this. I wanted to request again to reiterate how important this feature request it. It is not in my company’s best interest to share all the boards that are linked to a dashboard. It would be best practice to be able to give the client a link to a dashboard that they can see what has been updated and what is being worked on without having access to any of our boards. It would be extra beneficial if they did not need to create a Monday guest login to view the board. Simply if they have the link they can view. This would allow clients to track the progress of projects without seeing internal information.

posts.author: david.perry (David Perry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would appreciate an update on this. Being able to create a broadcast link for individual board dashboards and not for overview dashboards makes no sense to me.

There are a number of stakeholders that we work with who would appreciate the ability to view a dashboard that provides an overview of projects across the department, without the need to create a dedicated account for it.

posts.author: jodifactors (Jodi Nunes)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a top-priority request for us as well! Our clients need real-time, project status’ for all projects (coming from multiple boards). And they need to share out that information within their organization. We need it to be view-only so that the filters we set for their board cannot be adjusted to see other client work. Additionally, we DO NOT give board access to clients so the broadcast link would be an ideal situation so that we do not have to invite anyone as a guest.
